title: Police Crackdowns
description: More smuggled goods in a market that prohibits them can lead to police crackdowns. Saturation of contraband triggers increased enforcement. This creates a timing game - get in and out before crackdowns begin.
definition-of-done: Contraband saturation tracking per city. High saturation triggers crackdown state. Crackdowns increase detection risk. Saturation visible to player.
testing-plan: Verify saturation tracking works. Test crackdown trigger. Verify increased detection during crackdown. Test saturation display.
